case_title: ALFARO MICHAEL DBA DIAMOND REALTY CORP. VS RISSETTO EVELYN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-09-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-30-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
